audio.MusicPlayer

Beschreibung
audio
 
view
 

  • Verwendungen von MusicPlayer in audio

    Methoden in audio mit Parametern vom Typ MusicPlayer
    Modifizierer und Typ
    Methode
    Beschreibung
    static void
    MusicPlayer.playCombat(MusicPlayer musicPlayer)
    Plays the combat background music.
    static void
    MusicPlayer.playExploration(MusicPlayer musicPlayer)
    Plays the exploration background music.
    static void
    MusicPlayer.playMainMenu(MusicPlayer musicPlayer)
    Plays the main menu background music.
    static void
    MusicPlayer.playOtherMenus(MusicPlayer musicPlayer)
    Plays background music for secondary menu screens.

  • Verwendungen von MusicPlayer in view

    Methoden in view, die MusicPlayer zurückgeben
    Modifizierer und Typ
    Methode
    Beschreibung
    MusicPlayer
    GameFrame.getMusicPlayer()
    Returns the music player used to manage the game's background music and audio playback.
